/CAL:DV PROGRESS & FATHER ALFRED'S REPORTS/NP/X:PER APD, DEFENDANT WAS TERMINATED FROM DV & FATHER ALFRED'S BUT IS ENROLLED AT HEALTHRIGHT 360/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO GET APD GPS REINSTALLED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPT,/DEF: SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY APD/CTORD: APD WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE  DEFENDANT AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CONTD:PROOF OF APD GPS & HEALTHRIGHT 360/DOP/
